verses.1: “Call now; is there any who will answer you?
verses.2: For resentment kills the foolish man,
verses.3: I have seen the foolish taking root,
verses.4: His children are far from safety.
verses.5: whose harvest the hungry eat up,
verses.6: For affliction doesn’t come out of the dust,
verses.7: but man is born to trouble,
verses.8: “But as for me, I would seek God.
verses.9: who does great things that can’t be fathomed,
verses.10: who gives rain on the earth,
verses.11: so that he sets up on high those who are low,
verses.12: He frustrates the plans of the crafty,
verses.13: He takes the wise in their own craftiness;
verses.14: They meet with darkness in the day time,
verses.15: But he saves from the sword of their mouth,
verses.17: “Behold, happy is the man whom God corrects.
verses.18: For he wounds and binds up.
verses.19: He will deliver you in six troubles;
verses.20: In famine he will redeem you from death;
verses.21: You will be hidden from the scourge of the tongue,
verses.22: You will laugh at destruction and famine,
verses.23: For you will be allied with the stones of the field.
verses.24: You will know that your tent is in peace.
verses.25: You will know also that your offspring will be great,
verses.26: You will come to your grave in a full age,
verses.27: Behold, we have researched it. It is so.
